Interface ICreateMosaicDatasetParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control mosaic dataset creation parameters.

[Guid("98D47342-25E0-4FCA-8A23-34D006E312AE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICreateMosaicDatasetParameters2 : ICreateMosaicDatasetParameters

Properties

BandCount 

int BandCount { get; set; }

Property Value

int

BandDefinitionKeyword

The band definition keyword to be set on the mosaic dataset.

string BandDefinitionKeyword { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

BandProperties

Key band properties to be set on the mosaic dataset.

IArray BandProperties { get; set; }

IArray

TemplateMosaicDataset

The mosaic dataset from which key properties are copied over to the newly created mosaic dataset.

IMosaicDataset TemplateMosaicDataset { get; set; }
